Our Products
Alpha
D

Dash

Invoicing and bookkeeping for freelancers

Track time, send invoices, and manage expenses — all in one place. Forward your invoices by email and they're processed automatically. No clutter, no learning curve.

  • Time tracking & invoicing
  • Email invoice forwarding
  • Bank integration
  • VAT overview
Learn more Try the demo
Alpha
P

Perch

Smart CRM for your network

Manage your professional relationships through a natural language chat interface. No complex forms — just type what you want to do.

  • Chat-driven CRM
  • Dutch & English NLP
  • Multi-tenant architecture
  • Mobile-first design
Learn more Try the demo
Alpha
C

Cache

Your second brain for knowledge

Capture, organize and retrieve information effortlessly. Cache helps you remember what matters, when it matters.

  • Smart knowledge capture
  • Instant retrieval
  • Connected notes
  • API integrations
Learn more Try the demo

Built in Amsterdam

Siskin Labs is an independent software studio based in Amsterdam. We build tools that are fast, focused, and respectful of your data.
